sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105609" key="troxiambiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τροχῐαμβικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n105609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consisting of trochee and iambus,</tr_> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:pp.137,360" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">pp.137,360</biblScope> </bibl>C.</sense> </entryFree>
